zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Littlefield於1530年4月15日出生在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德時，他的父親William Littlefield30歲，母親Margaret Wrigley8歲。他於1548年與Annis Pope在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1605年10月29日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Littlefield于1530年4月15日出生在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德时，他的父亲William Littlefield30岁，母亲Margaret Wrigley8岁。他于1548年与Annis Pope在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1605年10月29日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Littlefield was born on 15 April 1530, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, his father, William Littlefield, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Wrigley, was 8. He married Annis Pope in 1548, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 October 1605, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Littlefield est né le 15 avril 1530, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, William Littlefield, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wrigley, avait 8 ans. Il a épousé Annis Pope en 1548, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1605, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Littlefield am 15. April 1530 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Littlefield 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Wrigley 8. Er hat 1548 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Annis Pope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1605 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Titchfield, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Littlefield è nato il il 15 aprile 1530 nel Titchfield, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, William Littlefield, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Wrigley, aveva 8 anni. Lui sposato Annis Pope nel 1548, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 ottobre 1605, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Littlefieldが1530年4月15日にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで生まれた時，父William Littlefieldは30歳，母Margaret Wrigleyは8歳であった。1548年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドでAnnis Popeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1605年10月29日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Littlefield(이)가 1530년 4월 15일 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Littlefield(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wrigley(은)는 8세였다. 그는 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 Annis Pope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1605년 10월 29일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에 묻혔다.

pt.15 April 1530–29 October 1605: 15 de abril de 1530–29 de outubro de 1605
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Littlefield nasceu em 15 de abril de 1530, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Littlefield, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wrigley, tinha 8 anos. Ele casou-se com Annis Pope em 1548, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1605, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Littlefield родился 15 апреля 1530 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Littlefield было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wrigley, 8. Он женился на женщине по имени Annis Pope в 1548 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 октября 1605 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия.

es.15 April 1530–29 October 1605: 15 de abril de 1530–29 de octubre de 1605
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Littlefield nació el 15 de abril de 1530, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Littlefield, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Wrigley, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Annis Pope en 1548, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1605, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
